# FolderDown

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FolderDown icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="FolderDown" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
directory, download, import, export

## Categories
files, arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/folder-down)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FolderDown;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FolderDown { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
